minMessages.description: Minimum session length (messages) before compression is applied. Default: 20.

keepRecentMessages.description: Number of most-recent messages kept verbatim after compression. Default: 10.

maxCapsuleTokens.description: Maximum tokens reserved for the injected extractive capsule. Default: 1400 (tuned for fidelity — near the knee of the recall/compression curve).

capsuleTokenRatio.description: When the host provides a model token budget, cap the capsule at this fraction of that budget. Default: 0.14.

minCompressTokens.description: Minimum estimated transcript tokens before compression is applied. Default: 900.
